semanticCore: Listening silently, paying attention, quietness, hush, or hear
quranicRelevance: Listening silently to Quran (Ansitoo - 'wa-ansitoo la'allakum'), and jinn calling to listen ('ansitoo').

keyDerivations.meaning: To listen silently, pay close attention, hush, keep quiet to hear, or keep silence

figurativeOrRareUsages: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ الْقُرْآنُ فَاسْتَمَعُوا لَهُ وَأَنْصُتُوا لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ (2:204): And when the Quran is recited, listen to it and keep silent/pay attention so that you may receive mercy.
discardedNoise: Silent pauses in modern audio players.
summaryEn: The root represents attentive silence (Insaat), mandating quiet listening (Ansitoo) when the Quran is read to ensure focus and capture divine mercy.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر السكوت للاستماع والإنصات المركز للصوت (نصت)، آمراً بالسكوت والتدبر عند تلاوة آيات القرآن التماساً للرحمة الإلهية.
rawText: إِنْتَصَبَ 8 see 1. استنصتةُ 10 He asked him, or desired him, to be silent: (K:) or, to be silent and to listen to him. (TA.) انصتهُ 4 He made him silent; silenced him. (Sh, K.) === انصتهُ عَنِّى He made him to be silent, [and to abstain] from [speaking of, or to,] me. (As.) === See 1. ___ انصت لِلَّهْوِ He inclined to play, or sport. (IAar, K.) نَصَتَ 1 , aor. ﹻ, (L, K,) inf. n. نَصْتٌ; (L;) and 🡻انصت, inf. n. إِنْصَاتٌ, (S, L, K) which latter is the more approved; (L;) and 🡻انتصت; (L, K;) He was silent: (L, K:) or he was silent and listened: (S:) or he was silent to listen: (L:) or he was silent as one listening: (Er-Rághib:) or he listened: (Msb:) or انتصب signifies he stood, or paused, listening. (Msb.) === 🡻أَنْصَتَهُ, and انصت لَهُ, (S, K,) and إِلَيْهِ, (Z,) and نَصَتَ لَهُ, (L,) He was silent, and listened to his speech. (S, K, &c.) نُصْتَةٌ Silence: [or silence and listening, &c.] (K.)
